/usr/bin/ar qc libuSockets.a CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/bsd.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/context.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/crypto/openssl.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/eventing/epoll_kqueue.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/eventing/gcd.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/eventing/libuv.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/loop.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/quic.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/socket.c.o CMakeFiles/uSockets.dir/__/__/_deps/usockets_content-src/src/udp.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libuSockets.a
